description: Implement a history tracking system for the 'Hotels' class in the 'demodb' database. Create a 'HotelHistory' vertex class with properties 'OriginalName' (String), 'OriginalStars' (Integer), 'OriginalPhone' (String), and 'MutationReason' (String), and a 'HasHistory' edge class. For each update, capture the hotel's pre-update state in a 'HotelHistory' vertex linked to the hotel via a 'HasHistory' edge. Execute these updates: set 'Hotel Artemide' to 5 stars (MutationReason: 'Annual Review'), change 'The Savoy' phone number to '+44-20-9999-8888' (MutationReason: 'Correction'), and rename 'Hotel Adlon Kempinski' to 'Adlon Kempinski Berlin' (MutationReason: 'Rebranding'). OrientDB Studio is open. Credentials: root / GymAnything123!.
